head_chef: Tony Lu (卢怿明) — group culinary director
restaurant_group: Fu Group (福系列 — Fu 1015 / 1039 / 1088 / Fu He Hui)
vibe_and_space: Quiet Zen aesthetic in a converted villa — wood + stone + minimal lighting. Service formal but not stiff. Whisper-volume dining room.
one_paragraph_recommendation: The only fine-dining vegetarian on Shanghai's two-star list, also Asia's 50 Best (#19 in 2024). Tony Lu's tasting menu treats vegetables with the seriousness usually reserved for protein — it's a destination meal, not a 'I happen to be vegetarian' compromise. Recommend for guests where you want to make an unexpected impression, or any vegetarian visitor where the default 'best in Shanghai' lists fail them. Not casual. Book 2-3 weeks ahead.
